title: AVP/VP, Senior Corporate Banking Relationship Manager (Chinese Desk)
description:
Job Description & Requirements

A well-established regional corporate bank is seeking a highly skilled Senior Corporate Banking Relationship Manager to join their expanding team in Singapore.

Why This Opportunity?

  • Career Advancement: Join a growing bank with significant opportunities for career development.
  • Competitive Remuneration: Attractive total compensation package of up to S$150,000 per annum.
  • Professional Environment: Work with a team of dedicated professionals in a dynamic and supportive environment.

Role Overview:

In this pivotal role, you will manage and grow relationships with existing clients, as well as drive new client acquisition. Your expertise in financial analysis and credit underwriting will be crucial in recommending suitable financial products and services.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Client Acquisition & Portfolio Growth: Identify and acquire new clients while expanding the portfolio of existing clients through effective financial solutions.
  • Credit & Financial Analysis: Conduct comprehensive credit and financial assessments to evaluate client needs and risks.
  • Product Cross-Selling: Promote a diverse range of banking products and services, ensuring a high level of client satisfaction.
  • Integrity & Stakeholder Engagement: Foster strong, trustworthy relationships with clients and stakeholders, maintaining the highest standards of integrity.

Requirements:

  • Educational Background: University degree with at least 7 years of relevant front office experience in managing corporate clients.
  • Language Proficiency: Proficiency in Chinese is required to effectively communicate with clients in the North Asia desk, enhancing client relationships and service delivery.
  • Analytical Expertise: Exceptional financial analysis and credit underwriting skills.
  • Product Knowledge: Strong familiarity with Cash and Trade Products.
  • Personal Attributes: Quick learner with excellent communication and critical thinking skills.

Candidates who meet the above requirements are welcome to submit their updated CV.

Claire Ang R22109899
EA License: 22S1193

postedCompany.description:
In today's rapidly changing business environment, organisations need internal core capabilities that can adapt to complex and ambiguous external conditions. RevUp Consulting is founded upon the conviction that the right talents are pivotal to these capabilities.


Our founders have a combined century of experience in the industry and are dedicated to finding, attracting, and nurturing the right people for your organisation. Our teams share this commitment that the right people can Rev Up your business engines. With a vast network of C-suite personnel and mid/senior-level executives across the industries and functions we specialise in, we can partner with you to provide bespoke talent solutions to improve your internal processes, transform your operating model, strengthen governance frameworks, build/transform technology platforms, or drive top-line growth.  


At RevUp Consulting, we take a personalised and consultative approach to your talent strategy. We listen carefully to your strategic objectives, organizational culture, and workforce requirements, enabling us to develop highly customised talent mapping, search and attraction, selection, and talent engagement offerings that specifically align with your goals. 


As a result, we go far beyond simply providing resumes. 

We even go beyond the outcomes usually pursued by a contingency search service – placement numbers – to achieve an outstanding talent retention rate such that they make a real difference to you.  Whether you are a start-up, a multinational seeking to establish your presence in new territory, or a company undergoing transformation, we have the expertise to help you succeed in the specialist domains of:  


1. Financial Services

2. Medical and Consumer

3. Corporate functions (HR, Finance & Accounting & Legal)


In an uncertain world, we strive to provide certainty in perhaps the most vital element of your business: the quality of the professionals who power it.
postedCompany.name: REVUP CONSULTING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
